note: Receipt IDs are Qdrant entity_ids (primary vector store). Most IDs are identical in the Neo4j graph. A few families use a different node id in Neo4j; use this map to resolve across stores. Responder-analysis content is vector-store-only (not materialized as graph nodes).

neo4j_id_differs.responder_analysis:responder_analysis_cr: (vector-store only; not materialized as a Neo4j node)
